title: Cheaper Golden Apples
description: Golden Apples now cost 4 gold ingots instead of 8
body:
Are you tired of constantly dying to mobs? Do you wish you didn’t have to grind so much gold just to craft a single golden apple?

With this mod, you won’t need to collect as much gold anymore. It reduces the crafting cost of golden apples from 8 golden ingots to just 4.
![4 gold surrounding a apple = gold apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/i6KfPWIs/images/8308eb25f30ac69dcc87776d2928c295150da4bb.png)

I made a discord server you can join if you want [https://discord.gg/UbPywERWPC](https://discord.gg/UbPywERWPC)
